content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Reviewed the cumulative branch diff for `src/adapters/process_backend.rs`, read the implementation file end-to-end, and ran `cargo test adapters::process_backend -- --nocapture`. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the bounded background-reap timeout change.

## Amendments

None.
